ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* API URL of the exchange for data integration */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating or score for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the pair is traded */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the pair (e.g., ETH) */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the pair (e.g., USD) */,
  "min_trade_amount" REAL /* Minimum trade amount allowed for the trading pair */,
  "max_trade_amount" REAL /* Maximum trade amount allowed for the trading pair */,
  "fee_structure" TEXT /* Fee structure for trading on this pair (e.g., maker and taker fees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the trading pair */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the trading pair */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the trading pair */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the trading pair */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the trading pair */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 7 days */,
  "change_30d" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 30 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, investor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the cryptocurrency was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the cryptocurrency was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair for the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is currently active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Whether the trade is completed or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trend */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Description of the trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend analysis */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal analysis, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)
